discovered_posts.author: tech_enthusiast
discovered_posts.content: Just deployed my first RustChain miner on a PowerBook G4! The antiquity multiplier is amazing - 2.5x base rewards. Anyone else mining on vintage hardware?

discovered_posts.title: Proof of Antiquity: The Future of Green Blockchain
discovered_posts.creator: crypto_educator
discovered_posts.description: Deep dive into how RustChain's PoA consensus works and why it's better than PoW

discovered_posts.author: dev_builder
discovered_posts.content: Looking for feedback on my new ShaprAI agent template. It uses DriftLock for identity verification and Beacons for mesh communication. GitHub link in comments!

discovered_posts.title: Building a Beacon Mesh Network with 3 Agents
discovered_posts.creator: mesh_pioneer
discovered_posts.description: Tutorial on setting up agent-to-agent communication using Beacon protocol

discovered_posts.author: vintage_collector
discovered_posts.content: My SPARCstation 20 just earned its first 100 RTC! These old machines are priceless. The clock-skew fingerprinting is genius - VMs can't emulate this.
